{count}

## 可复用的技能模板

### Hook 设计模板

```javascript
/**
 * 通用异步操作 Hook 模板
 * @param {Function} asyncFn 异步函数
 * @param {Array} dependencies 依赖数组
 * @param {Object} options 配置选项
 */
function useAsync(asyncFn, dependencies = [], options = {}) {
  const [state, setState] = useState({
    data: null,
    loading: false,
    error: null
  });

  const {
    immediate = true,
    onSuccess,
    onError,
    retryCount = 0
  } = options;

  const execute = useCallback(async (...args) => {
    setState(prev => ({ ...prev, loading: true, error: null }));

    try {
      const result = await asyncFn(...args);
      setState({ data: result, loading: false, error: null });
      onSuccess?.(result);
      return result;
    } catch (error) {
      setState({ data: null, loading: false, error });
      onError?.(error);
      throw error;
    }
  }, [asyncFn, onSuccess, onError]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (immediate) {
      execute();
    }
  }, dependencies);

  return {
    ...state,
    execute,
    reset: () => setState({ data: null, loading: false, error: null })
  };
}
```

### 错误处理模板

```javascript
/**
 * 带错误边界的 useEffect 模板
 */
function useSafeEffect(effect, dependencies = [], errorHandler) {
  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const cleanup = effect();
      return cleanup;
    } catch (error) {
      if (errorHandler) {
        errorHandler(error);
      } else {
        console.error('Effect error:', error);
      }
    }
  }, dependencies);
}
```

### 性能监控模板

```javascript
/**
 * 性能监控 useEffect 模板
 */
function useEffectWithPerf(name, effect, dependencies) {
  useEffect(() => {
    const start = performance.now();
    const cleanup = effect();
    const duration = performance.now() - start;

    if (duration > 16) { // 超过一帧时间
      console.warn(`Effect "${name}" took ${duration.toFixed(2)}ms`);
    }

    return cleanup;
  }, dependencies);
}
```
